LAW AND MOTION, 302, CROSS-DEFENDANT MAGTOGO, LLC'S DEMURRER TO CROSS-COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED WITH TWENTY DAYS TO ANSWER. ON A DEMURRER, A COURT IS REQUIRED TO ACCEPT THE EXPLICIT OR IMPLICIT INTERPRETATION OF DISPUTED CONTRACT LANGUAGE THAT IS ADVANCED BY THE CHALLENGED PLEADING, AS LONG AS THAT INTERPRETATION IS PLAUSIBLE, WHICH IT IS HERE. PREVAILING PARTY SHALL PREPARE FORM OF ORDER THAT COMPLIES WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE HAROLD KAHN; CLERK FELICIA GREEN (302/HK)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-11-2016 Vacated

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jan-21-2016 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-23-2015 Set For Trial On Feb-29-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-09-2015 Set For Trial On Jan-25-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Jul-22-2015 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-03-2015 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: CROSS-DEFENDANT MAGTOGO, LLC'S DEMURRER TO CROSS-COMPLAINT is overruled with twenty days to answer. On a demurrer, a court is required to accept the explicit or implicit interpretation of disputed contract language that is advanced by the challenged pleading, as long as that interpretation is plausible, which it is here. Prevailing party shall prepare form of order that complies with CRC 3.1312. Judge Harold Kahn; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302. (302/HK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-23-2015 Continued To Jul-22-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
